title: viola × discors
intro: Viola × discors, also known as the hybrid violet or pansy violet, is a flowering plant that is a cross between the common blue violet (Viola sororia) and the downy yellow violet (Viola pubescens). The medicinal properties of Viola × discors include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of consuming Viola × discors include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Viola × discors include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to soothe digestive issues, calm the nervous system, and promote overall well-being.
